Metadata.title: Gabriel Ernesto Rodriguez Zamora | Software Engineer
Metadata.description: Professional portfolio for Gabriel Ernesto Rodriguez Zamora, a Software Engineer specializing in mobile-first apps, web, cloud, automation, and AI applied to business workflows.

Layout.footerText: Gabriel Ernesto Rodriguez Zamora - Software Engineer

Hero.title: AI accelerates. Experience is accountable for the result.
Hero.description: I build mobile apps, websites, integrations, cloud foundations, and AI automations for businesses that want to reduce manual work, respond faster, and organize their processes without relying on improvised solutions.
Hero.visualLabel: Mobile, web, cloud, and applied AI
Hero.specialty: Apps, automations, integrations, and pipelines with human oversight.

WhatIDo.title: What I do
WhatIDo.description: I turn business needs into concrete systems: mobile experiences, websites, integrations, and AI workflows that work in real operations.

web.title: Apps and mobile-first experiences
web.body: I design and build Android and iOS apps, multiplatform solutions, and fast web experiences for customers, internal teams, or field operations.

product.title: AI automation and integration
product.body: I connect email, WhatsApp, CRMs, spreadsheets, APIs, and documents to create workflows that classify, summarize, notify, and execute repetitive tasks.

content.title: Cloud, quality, and technical operations
content.body: I configure infrastructure, deployments, CI/CD, monitoring, and AI-assisted pipelines so your systems are maintainable, measurable, and ready to grow.

Services.title: Services
Services.description: Six clear ways to move from an idea, operational problem, or existing product to a digital solution the business can actually use.

items.title: Digital and AI diagnosis
items.body: For businesses that want to use AI, automate tasks, or improve operations, but need clarity before investing in tools or development.
includes: Mapping manual processes and friction points.
Opportunities for app, web, cloud, integration, or AI.
Roadmap with risks, costs, quick wins, and priorities.
items.outcome: You get a clear path: what to automate, what to build first, and what to avoid.

items.title: AI automation or integration
items.body: For teams living across WhatsApp, email, Excel, forms, CRMs, or disconnected tools that want to reduce repetitive work.
includes: Classification of leads, requests, messages, or tickets.
Connection with APIs, CRMs, Google Sheets, databases, or internal tools.
items.outcome: We deliver a workflow running with your real tools and human review points.

items.title: Mobile and multiplatform apps
items.body: For businesses that need to launch an app, digitize a field process, or stabilize a mobile product already in use.
includes: Native Android and iOS apps or multiplatform solutions.
Authentication, payments, analytics, notifications, and offline mode.
Releases, performance, Play Store, maintenance, and technical support.
items.outcome: We build or improve a usable, connected product prepared for daily operation.

items.title: Websites, landing pages, and portals
items.body: For businesses that need to explain their offer better, capture leads, show services, or give access to customers and internal teams.
includes: Landing pages, professional websites, portals, and dashboards.
Forms, basic technical SEO, performance, and analytics.
Connection with WhatsApp, email, CRMs, APIs, or automations.
items.outcome: Your web presence becomes clear, fast, and connected to a measurable business action.

items.title: Cloud, data, and infrastructure
items.body: For businesses that already depend on scattered files, accounts, and tools and need a more organized foundation to operate.
includes: APIs, databases, storage, authentication, and backups.
Hosting, domains, monitoring, logs, and cost control.
Lightweight architecture on AWS, Google Cloud, Vercel, or equivalent services.
items.outcome: Your systems become better connected, monitored, and ready to grow without losing control.

items.title: Pipelines and internal copilots
items.body: For teams that want to use AI inside operations or development, with their own context, clear rules, and human approval.
includes: Internal assistants over documents, processes, or code.
Pipelines for QA, reports, documentation, releases, and follow-up.
Agentic workflows with permissions, traceability, and review before execution.
items.outcome: Your team gets AI support for repetitive work without losing supervision or judgment.

Services.ctaTitle: I do not sell AI as an accessory. I design complete workflows.
Services.ctaBody: Data, tools, permissions, costs, human validation, and maintenance: the solution should work in your operation, not only in a demo.

Portfolio.title: Portfolio
Portfolio.description: Projects that show judgment for building mobile products, automations, integrations, and technical tools ready for real operations.

projects.title: Multi-agent development framework
projects.problem: Problem: repetitive engineering and documentation workflows consumed time and depended too much on manually supplied context.
projects.solution: Solution: I designed a multi-agent orchestration framework with MCP, local tools, and custom servers to connect agents with real project context.
projects.technologies: Technologies: Codex, GitHub Copilot-CLI, MCP, TypeScript, Node.js, terminal automation.
projects.result: Result: a foundation for automating complex technical tasks with traceability and human control.

projects.title: Android and iOS modernization in retail
projects.problem: Problem: legacy Java modules and traditional UI slowed iteration speed, stability, and quality in a high-traffic app.
projects.solution: Solution: I migrated code to Kotlin, modernized UI with Jetpack Compose, modularized Gradle, and implemented CI/CD checks.
projects.technologies: Technologies: Kotlin, Java, Jetpack Compose, Retrofit, Dagger-Hilt, Coroutines, Gradle, Detekt, Lint.
projects.result: Result: mobile features for B2C and Loyalty domains impacting 100K+ daily active users.

projects.title: Eleuteria Writing Studio
projects.problem: Problem: create a complete product with a modern interface, API backend, local persistence, and automated quality gates.
projects.solution: Solution: I implemented a desktop app with a React UI, Fast API backend, SQLite, and frontend/backend test pipelines.
projects.technologies: Technologies: TypeScript, Python, React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Fast API, shadcn-ui, SQLite, GitHub Actions.
projects.result: Result: open-source application with CI/CD, pre-commit hooks, smoke tests, and automated coverage reporting.

projects.title: ReadE-DocOnline
projects.problem: Problem: securely read and verify ICAO-compliant electronic documents from Android and iOS, even in limited-connectivity scenarios.
projects.solution: Solution: I built a native app with NFC, MRZ OCR, and a secure handshake to extract encrypted data from e-passports and IDs.
projects.technologies: Technologies: Kotlin, Java, NFC, Android and iOS SDK, JMRTD, Bouncy Castle, OCR.
projects.result: Result: technical foundation for offline electronic document reading and secure verification.

Portfolio.caseStudyBody: Experience area backed by real projects, internal products, and technical automations.

BlogPreview.title: Explore the blog
BlogPreview.description: Practical ideas on mobile development, architecture, AI automation, and learnings from real projects to build with better judgment.

About.title: About me
About.description: I am a software engineer with 6+ years of experience building, modernizing, and automating digital products.
About.bio: I specialize in mobile, while also working with TypeScript, Python, React, Flutter, cloud, and automation tooling. My focus is turning business needs into concrete systems: apps, websites, integrations, pipelines, and AI workflows that work in real operations, not only in demos.

experience.title: Experience
experience.body: The Home Depot, IBM, Expedia Group, CODE Ingenieria, and Thales DIS, across mobile, retail, travel, telecom, NFC, and internal tooling projects.

judgment.title: Judgment
judgment.body: I prioritize business clarity, maintainable architecture, testing, measurable impact, and incremental decisions.

collaboration.title: Synergy
collaboration.body: I work with direct communication, useful documentation, and automation where it truly adds value.

values: Android and iOS and multiplatform apps with maintainable architecture.
Websites, portals, and dashboards connected to real data and tools.
AI automations with APIs, documents, CRMs, email, and spreadsheets.
Cloud, CI/CD, testing, monitoring, and technical pipelines with human oversight.

Contact.title: Let's talk about the process you want to improve.
Contact.description: Tell me if you need to launch an app, create a website, automate a manual operation, integrate tools, or apply AI with technical judgment.

form.label: Contact form
form.name: Name
form.messageHint: Tell me which process you want to improve, automate, or turn into a product.
